title: narcissus rupicola subsp. watieri
intro: Narcissus rupicola subsp. watieri, also known as the Corsican rock narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus rupicola subsp. watieri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
